focus.title: Focus this week
focus.subtitle: Start with the most actionable wardrobe signals before deciding what to organize today.

recent.title: Recent looks
recent.subtitle: Quickly review the latest saved outfit records.

highlights.recentSubtitle: items were updated in the last 30 days
highlights.emptySubtitle: Add more items and outfit records, and this area will surface the key signals automatically.

wardrobe.title: Wardrobe
wardrobe.subtitle: Search, filter, review, and add items in one place.
wardrobe.empty: No items yet. Add your first piece.
wardrobe.noResults: No matching items. Try adjusting the search term or filters.
wardrobe.newSubtitle: Upload photos and save the key metadata for a searchable digital wardrobe.
wardrobe.detailSubtitle: Review and edit the full metadata of this piece, then save again.

detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this wardrobe item? This action cannot be undone.

list.selectionIdle: Enter selection mode when you need batch actions
list.selectHint: Select multiple rows to delete them together
list.deleteSelectedConfirm: Delete the selected wardrobe items? This action cannot be undone.

common.imageHint: Upload 1-3 clear photos. AI attribute recognition can be attached later.
common.imageEmpty: Preview will appear here after upload
common.saveSuccess: Item saved. This is the first API-connected submission flow.
common.saveError: Save failed. Please check required fields.
common.manualWearHint: This is a manual value outside the outfit calendar records, and it will be calculated separately from OOTD stats.

placeholders.designElements: Design elements, split multiple values with commas
placeholders.tags: Tags, split multiple values with commas

ootd.title: Outfit Calendar
ootd.subtitle: Browse daily looks in the calendar and add new outfits from the candidate pool.

composer.title: Add Today's Look
composer.subtitle: Pick pieces from your wardrobe and upload one hero photo. You can save up to 5 looks per day.
composer.imageHint: Upload one main photo for the calendar and detail view.
composer.itemLimit: You can save up to 5 outfit records for the same day.
composer.saveError: Failed to save the look. Please try again.
composer.noItems: No wardrobe items available yet. Add some items first.
composer.searchPlaceholder: Search by brand, type, color, design details, material, tags, and more
composer.noSearchResults: No wardrobe items matched the current search.

calendar.title: Outfit Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Scan the month at a glance, then inspect the selected day in the side panel.
calendar.selectedDayEmpty: No looks saved for this day yet
calendar.selectedDayHint: Pick a day from the calendar to inspect its looks.
calendar.fullDayHint: This day has reached the limit and cannot add another look.
calendar.deleteConfirm: Delete this outfit? This action cannot be undone.
calendar.deleteSelectedConfirm: Delete the selected outfits? This action cannot be undone.

detail.title: OOTD Detail
detail.subtitle: Review the hero photo, scenario, and linked wardrobe items for this look.
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this outfit? This action cannot be undone.
detail.editSubtitle: Update the date, scenario, photo, and linked items, then save again.
detail.noNotes: No notes for this look yet.
detail.itemsSubtitle: Open any item to jump into its wardrobe detail page.

candidates.pageSubtitle: Collect pieces you may want to wear today, then build the final look from that short list.
candidates.title: Candidate Pool
candidates.subtitle: Items added from wardrobe and OOTD search results are collected here.
candidates.empty: No candidate items yet. Add some from wardrobe or the OOTD search results first.

timeline.noNotes: No notes saved for this day.

looks.title: Lookbook
looks.subtitle: Save favorite outfit combinations and add them into any day when needed.
looks.addToDaySubtitle: Choose a date to quickly add this saved look into the outfit calendar.
looks.addError: Failed to add. Check whether this day has already reached the 5-look limit.
looks.deleteSelectedConfirm: Delete the selected looks? This action cannot be undone.
looks.deleteError: Failed to delete. Please try again.
looks.empty: No saved looks yet. Create one first.
looks.newSubtitle: Reuse the same composition flow as today's outfit, but save it as a favorite combination.
looks.detailSubtitle: Review the hero photo, notes, and linked items for this saved look.
looks.noUsedDates: This look has not been added to any day yet.
looks.editSubtitle: Update the scenario, notes, photo, and linked items for this saved look.
looks.itemLimit: This look will be saved in your lookbook.

search.title: Search
search.placeholder: Search by brand, color, category, or type
search.filtersPlaceholder: This area will host combinational filters for brand, color, season, and style.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Understand your wardrobe through structure, spend, wear frequency, and monthly outfit activity.
insights.empty: There is not enough data to generate insights yet.

spend.title: Spend by category
spend.subtitle: See where most of your wardrobe budget goes.

spendTrend.title: Monthly spend trend
spendTrend.subtitle: Track spend changes over the last 6 months based on purchase dates.

ootdTrend.title: Monthly outfit count
ootdTrend.subtitle: Outfit activity across the last 6 months.

category.title: Category breakdown
category.subtitle: How your wardrobe is distributed across categories.

color.title: Color breakdown
color.subtitle: The colors that appear most often in your wardrobe.

brand.title: Brand breakdown
brand.subtitle: Brands you buy or keep most often.

idle.title: Top 10 idle items
idle.subtitle: Pieces to review first when decluttering.

costPerWear.title: Top 10 cost per wear
costPerWear.subtitle: Pieces with the highest effective cost per wear.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Review the current account, sign-in methods, and core preferences.
profile.loginRequired: Sign in to manage account, sync settings, and language preferences.
profile.accountSubtitle: The current signed-in account owns your wardrobe, outfit, and analytics data.
profile.noProviders: You are still using demo mode and no production sign-in provider is linked yet.
profile.preferencesSubtitle: Keep only the settings that matter here instead of placeholder controls.
profile.languageSubtitle: The UI switches instantly between Chinese and English and keeps the matching locale route.
profile.timezoneSubtitle: The default account time zone used by future records and analytics displays.
profile.dataSubtitle: How data is scoped to the current account and what happens after sign-in.
profile.scopeBody: Wardrobe items, outfit calendar, lookbook, and analytics are all tied to the currently signed-in account. Switching accounts will show that account's own data.
profile.demoMigrationBody: If you created data earlier in local demo mode, the system imports it into the current account automatically on the first successful sign-in.

login.title: Sign in to your wardrobe account
login.subtitle: Use Google, Apple, or the upcoming WeChat login to access your personal wardrobe, outfits, and analytics data.
login.privacy: Sign-in is used to identify your data space and keep sessions across devices. Account linking and richer privacy settings will be added later.
features: Record and sync your outfit calendar
Review analytics and history across devices

error.title: Sign-in failed
error.subtitle: The auth flow is not ready yet, or the third-party provider is not fully configured. Try again later, or keep using the current demo mode for now.

required.title: Sign in to continue
required.wardrobeSubtitle: Adding items, uploading images, and Excel import require sign-in before the data can be saved into your personal wardrobe space.
required.ootdSubtitle: Saving outfits, uploading outfit photos, and managing the candidate pool require sign-in before the data can sync into your outfit calendar.

success.title: Signed in successfully
success.description: If demo data was detected locally, it has been imported into your current account automatically.

import.title: Excel Import
import.subtitle: Batch import wardrobe items. Download the template first, then fill each worksheet and upload it.
import.uploadDescription: Upload the Excel workbook and an optional image ZIP together. The system first matches images by image name or row identifier, then imports everything in one step.
import.templateDescription: The template mirrors your current wardrobe workbook and includes sheets for clothing, accessories, bags, shoes, and jewelry.
import.templateFields: Suggested clothing headers: id, image_name, brand, category, type, color, design elements, material, sleeve type, collar type, fit, silhouette, style direction, season, price, price range, wear days, cost per wear, purchase year, purchase channel, item age, favorite score, outfit pairing. The image ZIP matches `image_name` first, then falls back to `id.ext`.
